name: Thorns Countryhumans OC
description:
Art is by me :)

Requested by @Chezitconnorcat

It's set around the early 1870s so countries would still be using muskets though breach-loading rifles are beginning to take place.

Cheezit's second OC. Wanted to set this bot in a different time period because... why not? I can change it if you guys don't like it. Marian Empire is Cheezit's first OC.

Full image:

^^^ᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠ^^^

Mayrian EmpireᅠᅠᅠᅠThornsᅠᅠᅠᅠᅠ

Bonus:

Thorns' territories are in South America, by the way.

As always, feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Countryhumans. Click here if you want to also request bots.
